html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

-

Ancient Stonework is a Turf Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be found in the Ancient Archive biome by picking it up using a Pitchfork. It can also be crafted after obtaining the blueprint from the yellow Distilled Knowledge.

Tips

  • For players who wish to dig Ancient Stonework without making the archive look barren, digging under the Archive Orchestrina, the Sealed Portal, Walls, and Pillars are good places to dig up these turfs.

Trivia

  • The Ancient Stonework was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.

'''Ancient Stonework''' is a [[Turf]] [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It can be found in the [[Ancient Archive]] biome by picking it up using a [[Pitchfork]].  It can also be crafted after obtaining the blueprint from the yellow [[Fountain_of_Knowledge#Distilled_Knowledge|Distilled Knowledge]].

==  {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* For players who wish to dig Ancient Stonework without making the archive look barren, digging under the [[Archive Orchestrina]], the [[Sealed Portal]], [[Wall|Walls]], and [[Pillars]] are good places to dig up these turfs.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}}Trivia ==
* The Ancient Stonework was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Forgotten Knowledge|Forgotten Knowledge]]'' update.
